entities.name: Operator
entities.context: Default persona for general task execution, file operations, and routing to specialists

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: Persona for implementing systems, writing scripts, building infrastructure, and refactoring code

entities.name: Strategist
entities.context: Persona for strategic decisions, pattern analysis, generating options, and framework building

entities.name: Architect
entities.context: Persona for designing personas, creating prompts, system blueprints, and meta-design work

entities.name: Writer
entities.context: Persona for documentation, content creation, technical writing, and user guides

entities.name: Teacher
entities.context: Persona for learning new concepts, explaining systems, and clarifying technical topics

entities.name: Debugger
entities.context: Persona for verification, testing, finding violations, and quality assurance

entities.name: Researcher
entities.context: Persona for information gathering, due diligence, competitive analysis, and deep dives

entities.name: Persona System
entities.context: Framework of specialized AI personas for different types of work

relationships.context: Routes to Builder for implementation work
Routes to Strategist for strategic decisions
Routes to Architect for design work
Routes to Teacher for learning and explanations
Routes to Debugger for verification and QA
Routes to Researcher for information gathering
Operator is the default entry point for the persona system
